name: One Rewrite to Fix Them All? Type-Aware Repair Allocation for Text-to-Image Prompt Optimization
summary: arXiv:2607.18724v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generators often fail to follow their prompts faithfully, producing wrong counts, swapped attributes, ambiguous relations, and il...
description: arXiv:2607.18724v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generators often fail to follow their prompts faithfully, producing wrong counts, swapped attributes, ambiguous relations, and illegible text. Prompt optimization repairs such failures by rewriting the user prompt, requiring no generator retraining, and has yielded promising results. However, existing optimizers absorb heteroge...
author: Haoyue Liu, Xiaoyu Ma, Ye Chen, Shuguang Cui, Xiaoying Tang
